hypothesis: An SE(3)-equivariant graph neural network trained on the XDIP dataset using the original (non-interpolated) XANES and EXAFS spectra paired with the 3D local-structure graphs will reduce EXAFS prediction MAE by at least 15% relative to the GIN baseline reported in the paper and enable classification of iron oxidation state with at least 90% accuracy on a held-out test set.
